name: Grubby Fingers
short_description: GRUBBY FINGERS is an experimental point-and-click game about scratching lottery tickets in a surreal gas station lost in the middle of nowhere. Explore a liminal gas station, listen to generative dark jazz, and solve a mystery or two while chasing your next big win.
detailed_description:
Scratch away at your leisure and win big money while listening to some gloomy generative dark jazz! Who knows, maybe that locked door will open at some point and you can get out of this strange gas station in the middle of nowhere... 

Controls:
Look around with the mouse
Click to move
Press I to open and close the inventory
Esc for options and pause

Keep an eye on your energy bar on the bottom of the screen!

🤑🤑🤑

I developed GRUBBY FINGERS over five years as a passion project. The game offers a cinematic scratch ticket experience with pre-rendered 360° backgrounds, a real-time procedurally generated soundtrack, 12 different scratch tickets, 5 flavours of energy drinks and relaxing solitude.

💰 💰 💰

Emojis from OpenMoji are used in this game. They are licensed under the CC BY-SA 4.0 license.
